channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Boat Accident in Jigawa Leaves One Dead, Many Missing
item.description: A tragic boat accident occurred in Malamawa community, Yan Dutse district of Ringim Local Government Area, Jigawa State, leaving one person dead and many missing. The incident happened on Sunday when ...

item.title: Kapamilya Stars Head to Sydney for ASAP XP Australia 2026
item.description: The 'ASAP XP Australia 2026' event is set to bring prominent Kapamilya stars to Sydney, Australia, as part of its global outreach efforts. This event, which marks the 2026 edition of the popular Kapam...

item.title: Understanding why children resist wearing jumpers in the cold
item.description: Children often claim they aren't cold when refusing to wear jumpers, but this isn't about stubbornness. Research explains that kids experience cold differently from adults due to factors like higher m...

item.title: Musician Jennifer Finch Dies at 59 After Losing Battle with Brain Cancer
item.description: Kenyan music icon Jennifer Finch, best known as the bassist and vocalist of influential punk band L7, has passed away at age 59 after a fierce battle with an aggressive form of brain cancer. Her death...

item.title: Matlala and Co-Defendants Face Trial Over Alleged Assassination Attempts in South Africa
item.description: The trial of Vusimuzi 'Cat' Matlala, an alleged member of the 'Big Five' cartel, and four co-accused individuals has commenced in the Johannesburg High Court. Matlala and two alleged hitmen remain in ...

item.title: Autism Alliance of Canada advances coordinated advocacy for societal inclusion
item.description: The Autism Alliance of Canada, formed in 2007 by five organizations advocating for autism support, has grown to include 1,500 members. The alliance focuses on creating equal rights and opportunities f...

item.title: Spain wins World Cup final against Argentina after violent clashes and emotional moments
item.description: Spain secured their second World Cup title with a 1-0 victory over Argentina in a dramatic final that descended into violence after full-time. Ferran Torres' extra-time goal sealed the win for Luis de...

item.title: SUA Research Enhances Disease Surveillance in Africa
item.description: The article discusses how SUA (Southern University of Africa) research is playing a crucial role in improving disease surveillance across the continent. This initiative aims to strengthen public healt...

item.title: Miss Manners Advises on Tourist Etiquette Abroad
item.description: The article addresses a traveler's question about cultural sensitivity regarding casual attire while visiting foreign countries. A local tour guide criticized American tourists for wearing shorts, hal...

item.title: Madhya Pradesh Approves UCC Draft Bill with Adivasi Exemptions
item.description: The Madhya Pradesh Cabinet has approved a draft Uniform Civil Code (UCC) bill that aims to establish common laws for marriage, divorce, succession, and adoption across all citizens. The legislation ba...

item.title: Senegal's President Diomaye Faye Assumes ECOWAS Leadership Amid Regional Challenges
item.description: Senegal President Bassirou Diomaye Faye has been elected Chairman of the ECOWAS Authority of Heads of State and Government, succeeding Sierra Leonean President Julius Maada Bio. This leadership transi...

item.title: Teenager Dies After Fountain Collapse During Spain's World Cup Celebrations
item.description: A 13-year-old boy died and at least three others were seriously injured when a fountain collapsed in Ciudad Rodrigo, Salamanca, during Spain's World Cup victory celebrations. The incident occurred on ...

item.title: Spain clinches FIFA World Cup 2026 after thrilling victory over Argentina
item.description: Spain secured their second FIFA World Cup title in 2026 with a dramatic 1-0 victory over Argentina in a fiercely contested final. The match, held in a packed stadium, saw Ferran Torres score the decis...

item.title: Jeff Bezos' private jet and VIP access to Sydney's beaches
item.description: Jeff Bezos' recent 43-hour visit to Sydney highlights the exclusive travel privileges of ultra-wealthy individuals. Using his $114 million Gulfstream G700 jet, Bezos and his wife, Lauren Sanchez Bezos...

item.title: SUA Research Enhances Disease Surveillance Across Africa
item.description: The article discusses how research conducted by SUA (likely a research institution or organization) is significantly improving disease surveillance systems across various African countries. This initi...

item.title: Pakistan and Canada Strengthen Bilateral Ties Through Diplomatic Engagement
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister Ishaq Dar emphasized Pakistan's commitment to strengthening bilateral relations with Canada during the visit of Canadian Foreign Minister Anita Anand. The delegation-level talks,...

item.title: Wayne Rooney criticises World Cup half-time show for being unengaging
item.description: The first World Cup final half-time show, which extended the traditional 15-minute break to 27 minutes, faced criticism from former England forward Wayne Rooney and fellow pundits. The event, curated ...

item.title: Wildfires threaten Manitoba's logging industry and economic stability
item.description: The Manitoba logging industry faces significant challenges as wildfires continue to burn through forests, threatening both the supply of timber and the livelihoods of workers. Arnold Reimer, a seasone...

item.title: Pulse Asia survey shows decline in Marcos' trust and approval ratings while Sara Duterte's ratings remain stable
item.description: A Pulse Asia Research Inc. survey released on July 20, 2026 showed a significant decline in the public trust and approval ratings of President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr., while Vice President Sar...

item.title: Hamilton Not at Fault as Ferrari Penalized for Pitstop Incident
item.description: Lewis Hamilton was not held accountable after his car accidentally knocked over a Ferrari mechanic during a chaotic Belgian Grand Prix pitstop. The incident occurred when the mechanic stepped forward ...
